description: C4 model for the Magrathea S3-compatible object storage service

people.description: End user or automated client using AWS CLI, SDK, curl, or another S3-compatible HTTP client.
people.name: User

components.description: Handles bucket lifecycle endpoints: create, delete, head, list, location, versioning and directory-bucket listing.
components.name: S3BucketOperationsHandler

relationships.description: Calls bucket lifecycle, listing, directory-bucket use cases
Calls bucket lifecycle, listing, directory-bucket use cases

components.description: Handles bucket metadata endpoints such as ACL and tagging.
components.name: S3BucketMetadataHandler

components.description: Handles bucket configuration endpoints using registry/strategy dispatch pattern: CORS, lifecycle, policy, encryption, logging, website, notification, replication, request payment, ownership controls, public access block, accelerate, analytics, inventory, metrics, intelligent-tiering, ABAC, object lock, bucket metadata configuration, metadata table configuration, inventory table configuration, journal table configuration.
components.name: S3BucketConfigHandler

components.description: Handles object operations: put, get, head, delete, copy, multi-delete, rename, torrent, restore, select, and Object Lambda response.
components.name: S3ObjectOperationsHandler

components.description: Handles object metadata endpoints such as ACL, tagging, attributes, legal hold, retention, and encryption metadata.
components.name: S3ObjectMetadataHandler

components.description: Handles multipart upload lifecycle: initiate, upload part, list parts, complete, abort and list uploads.
components.name: S3MultipartHandler

components.description: Handles CreateSession for Phase F session management.
components.name: S3SessionHandler

components.description: Entry point RouterFunction: defines all S3 routes and dispatches requests to handlers based on HTTP method, path, query parameters, and headers.
components.name: S3ProxyRouter

components.description: Shared request predicates, XML parsing, error response helpers, and S3 error serialization.
components.name: S3WebSupport

containers.description: HTTP adapter that exposes the S3-compatible REST API and translates HTTP/XML/binary requests into reactive application use cases.
containers.name: s3-reactive-api-adapter

relationships.description: Calls bucket lifecycle, listing, directory-bucket use cases
Calls bucket lifecycle, listing, directory-bucket use cases

containers.technology: Spring Boot 4 WebFlux, RouterFunction, Java 21, Jackson XML

components.description: Reactive application service for object CRUD, metadata lookup, object listing, binary content retrieval, and Phase F operations (legal hold, retention, torrent, restore, select, Object Lambda, rename, encryption update).
components.name: ReactiveObjectService

relationships.description: Persists and loads objects/content via domain repository port
Creates/restores object metadata with legal hold, retention, encryption transitions

components.description: Reactive application service for multipart upload sessions and part lifecycle.
components.name: ReactiveMultipartUploadService

relationships.description: Persists and loads multipart uploads via domain repository port
Creates/updates multipart upload state with domain events

components.description: Domain aggregate for object identity, bucket id, key, ETag, storage class, content metadata, legal hold, retention, and encryption. Enforces state transitions with withLegalHold/withoutLegalHold, withRetention/withoutRetention, withEncryption/withoutEncryption. Emits ObjectStoreEvent domain events on transitions.
components.name: S3Object

components.description: Domain aggregate for multipart upload state, uploaded parts and completion/abort status. Emits ObjectStoreEvent domain events on transitions.
components.name: MultipartUpload

components.description: Domain repository port for object metadata and binary content persistence (including legal hold, retention, restore, select data).
components.name: S3ObjectRepository port

relationships.description: CQS command interface for S3Object persistence
CQS command interface for S3Object persistence
CQS query interface for S3Object reads

components.description: Domain repository port for multipart upload persistence.
components.name: MultipartUploadRepository port

relationships.description: CQS command interface for MultipartUpload persistence
CQS command interface for MultipartUpload persistence
CQS query interface for MultipartUpload reads

components.description: Application-layer content boundary for carrying Flux<DataBuffer> without leaking reactive types into the domain model.
components.name: DefaultS3ObjectWrite / DefaultS3ObjectContent

containers.description: Reactive object storage capability: object upload, download, metadata lookup, deletion, multipart object workflows, Phase F advanced operations (legal hold, retention, torrent, restore, select, Object Lambda, encryption update) using reactive services and domain aggregates.
containers.name: reactive-object-store

relationships.description: CQS command interface for S3Object persistence
CQS command interface for S3Object persistence
CQS query interface for S3Object reads
CQS command interface for MultipartUpload persistence
CQS query interface for MultipartUpload reads

components.description: Reactive application service for bucket lifecycle, versioning, CORS, lifecycle, policy, encryption, logging, website, notification, replication, request payment, ownership controls, public access block, accelerate, analytics, inventory, metrics, intelligent-tiering, ABAC, object lock, bucket metadata configuration, metadata table configuration, inventory table configuration, journal table configuration, and session management.
components.name: ReactiveBucketService

relationships.description: Persists and loads bucket aggregates via domain repository port
Creates/updates bucket aggregate root with dedicated with* config methods (emits specific ObjectStoreEvent subtypes)

components.description: Domain aggregate root for bucket identity, name, region, storage class, versioning/encryption state and dedicated configuration fields per config type (CorsConfiguration, BucketLifecycleConfiguration, BucketEncryptionConfiguration, BucketLoggingConfiguration, BucketWebsiteConfiguration, BucketNotificationConfiguration, BucketReplicationConfiguration, BucketPolicy, PublicAccessBlockConfiguration, BucketOwnershipControls, BucketRequestPaymentConfiguration, BucketAccelerateConfiguration, plus multi-instance maps for Analytics, Inventory, Metrics, Intelligent-Tiering). Each config feature has a dedicated with*() / without*() method. Emits specific ObjectStoreEvent subtypes per config change (BucketConfigurationChanged with full BucketConfig payload).
components.name: Bucket

components.description: Domain repository port for bucket aggregate persistence (including ABAC, object lock, metadata/table configuration storage).
components.name: BucketRepository port

relationships.description: CQS command interface for Bucket persistence
CQS command interface for Bucket persistence
CQS query interface for Bucket reads

containers.description: Reactive bucket management capability: bucket lifecycle, metadata, configuration, CORS/versioning, bucket-level operations, and Phase F advanced bucket config (ABAC, object lock, metadata config, table config).
containers.name: reactive-bucket-management

relationships.description: CQS command interface for Bucket persistence
CQS command interface for Bucket persistence
CQS query interface for Bucket reads

components.description: Write-side repository interface for bucket aggregate persistence.
components.name: BucketCommandRepository

components.description: Read-side repository interface for bucket aggregate queries.
components.name: BucketQueryRepository

components.description: Write-side repository interface for S3Object aggregate persistence (including legal hold, retention, restore, select data).
components.name: S3ObjectCommandRepository

components.description: Read-side repository interface for S3Object aggregate queries.
components.name: S3ObjectQueryRepository

components.description: Write-side repository interface for MultipartUpload aggregate persistence.
components.name: MultipartUploadCommandRepository

components.description: Read-side repository interface for MultipartUpload aggregate queries.
components.name: MultipartUploadQueryRepository

containers.description: Command/Query repository interfaces: BucketCommandRepository, BucketQueryRepository, S3ObjectCommandRepository, S3ObjectQueryRepository, MultipartUploadCommandRepository, MultipartUploadQueryRepository.
containers.name: reactive-repository-application

components.description: In-memory reactive implementation of BucketCommandRepository and BucketQueryRepository. Internally stores bucket aggregates in ConcurrentHashMap structures. Extended to support session, ABAC, object lock, and metadata/table configuration storage.
components.name: InMemoryReactiveBucketRepository

components.description: In-memory reactive implementation of S3ObjectCommandRepository and S3ObjectQueryRepository. Internally stores object metadata and raw object bytes in ConcurrentHashMap structures. Extended to support legal hold, retention, restore, and select request/response storage.
components.name: InMemoryReactiveS3ObjectRepository

components.description: In-memory reactive implementation of MultipartUploadCommandRepository and MultipartUploadQueryRepository. Internally stores multipart upload sessions in a ConcurrentHashMap structure.
components.name: InMemoryReactiveMultipartUploadRepository

components.description: Pure domain model: StoragePolicy, EffectiveStoragePolicy, VirtualDevice (BucketDevice, DedupDevice), DedupNamespace, WorkflowCompatibilityKey, DeviceConfigurationHash, StepPlan, StepExecutionTrace, ChunkPersistenceTrace, ObjectManifest, StoredObject aggregate. Zero framework dependencies.
components.name: storage-engine-domain

components.description: Reactive orchestration layer: ReactiveStorageOrchestrator, Chunker, ApplicationChunkPayload, ports (StoragePolicyCatalog, StoredObjectRepository, ObjectManifestRepository, ContentAddressIndex, ChecksumPort, DataTransformPort, AlterationPort, ChunkStorePort).
components.name: storage-engine-application

relationships.description: Uses domain services (PersistencePlanner, EffectivePolicyResolver, VirtualDeviceResolver, CompleteUploadService)
Persists via ports (ChunkStorePort, ContentAddressIndex, ManifestRepository, StoredObjectRepository)

components.description: Filesystem cluster backend: FileSystemStorageCluster, FileSystemStorageNode, FileSystemVirtualDeviceMapper, FileSystemContentAddressIndex, FileSystemManifestRepository, FileSystemStoredObjectRepository, checksum/compression/encryption/EC/replication adapters, FaultInjectingStorageCluster chaos decorator.
components.name: storage-engine-infrastructure

components.description: Anti-Corruption Layer + adapter: implements Object Store repository interfaces using Storage Engine backend. Contains ObjectStoreToStorageEngineTranslator, StorageEngineReactiveS3ObjectRepository, StorageEngineReactiveBucketRepository, StorageEngineReactiveMultipartUploadRepository.
components.name: object-store-reactive-repository-storage-engine-infrastructure

relationships.description: Delegates persistence to Storage Engine orchestrator

containers.description: Storage Engine bounded context: persistence pipeline, virtual devices, deduplication, erasure coding, content-addressed storage, manifest management.
containers.name: storage-engine

softwareSystems.description: AWS S3-compatible object storage built with Spring Boot 4 WebFlux and Java 21.
softwareSystems.name: Magrathea ObjectStore

name: Magrathea ObjectStore

componentViews.description: RouterFunction and handler components that expose the S3-compatible HTTP protocol. Includes S3ProxyRouter, S3SessionHandler, S3WebSupport, and all six handler components with registry dispatch in S3BucketConfigHandler.
componentViews.name: Component View: Magrathea ObjectStore - s3-reactive-api-adapter
componentViews.title: C3 Component: s3-reactive-api-adapter

componentViews.description: Reactive object and multipart upload application services, domain aggregates with state transitions and domain events, repository ports, and content boundary. Supports Phase F advanced operations (legal hold, retention, torrent, restore, select, Object Lambda, encryption update).
componentViews.name: Component View: Magrathea ObjectStore - reactive-object-store
componentViews.title: C3 Component: reactive-object-store

componentViews.description: Reactive bucket management service, bucket aggregate root with dedicated with* methods per config type and specific ObjectStoreEvent subtypes, and repository port. Supports Phase F advanced bucket config (ABAC, object lock, metadata/table config).
componentViews.name: Component View: Magrathea ObjectStore - reactive-bucket-management
componentViews.title: C3 Component: reactive-bucket-management

componentViews.description: Command/Query repository interfaces for bucket, S3Object and multipart upload aggregates.
componentViews.name: Component View: Magrathea ObjectStore - reactive-repository-application
componentViews.title: C3 Component: reactive-repository-application

componentViews.description: Reactive repository adapters used by the application capabilities. Extended to support session, ABAC, object lock, metadata/table configuration, legal hold, retention, restore, and select data. Internal ConcurrentHashMap structures are intentionally not shown as C4 components.
componentViews.name: Component View: Magrathea ObjectStore - reactive-infrastructure
componentViews.title: C3 Component: reactive-infrastructure

componentViews.description: Storage Engine bounded context: domain model, reactive orchestration layer, filesystem cluster backend, and Anti-Corruption Layer adapter that implements Object Store repository interfaces using the Storage Engine backend.
componentViews.name: Component View: Magrathea ObjectStore - storage-engine
componentViews.title: C3 Component: storage-engine

containerViews.description: s3-reactive-api-adapter exposes the S3 API with RouterFunction dispatch; reactive-object-store and reactive-bucket-management implement core reactive capabilities with Phase F advanced operations; reactive-repository-application provides CQS interfaces; reactive-infrastructure persists state reactively in-process; and storage-engine provides the Storage Engine bounded context for persistence pipeline, virtual devices, deduplication, erasure coding, content-addressed storage, and manifest management.
containerViews.name: Container View: Magrathea ObjectStore
containerViews.title: C2 Container: Magrathea ObjectStore
